title: Savory British Pork Crumble
description: A hearty and comforting dish featuring tender pork in a rich crumble topping.
instructions: In a large skillet, cook the diced pork over medium-high heat until browned, about 5 minutes.
Add the diced bacon and cook until crispy, about 3-4 minutes.
Add the diced onion and carrots, and cook until softened, about 5 minutes.
Roll out the British flaky pastry to a thickness of about 1/8 inch.
Transfer the cooked pork mixture to a 9x13 inch baking dish.
Place the pastry over the pork mixture, pressing the edges to seal.
Brush the egg wash over the pastry.
Sprinkle the breadcrumbs and grated cheese over the pastry.
Bake for 25-30 minutes, or until the pastry is golden brown and the filling is hot and bubbly.
